n1_approved_by_administration.logic: result = {'status': 'approved', 'case_id': state['case_id']} if state['status'] == 'submitted' else {'status': 'pending', 'case_id': state['case_id']}

n2_final_approved_by_supervisor.logic: result = {'status': 'final_approved', 'case_id': state['case_id']} if state['status'] == 'approved' else {'status': 'pending', 'case_id': state['case_id']}

n3_pay.logic: result = {'action': 'pay', 'case_id': state['case_id']} if state['status'] == 'final_approved' else {'action': 'hold', 'case_id': state['case_id']}

n4_payment_handled.logic: result = {'status': 'payment_handled', 'case_id': state['case_id']} if state['action'] == 'pay' else {'status': 'not_processed', 'case_id': state['case_id']}
